description_long: This is a stylized female doll with a slender build, dressed in a form-fitting, strapless corset dress that transitions from red at the top to black at the bottom, accented with gold trim. The doll features long, black opera gloves that extend above the elbows and thigh-high black stockings with a glossy finish, paired with high-heeled shoes. Her skin is pale, and she has a short, wavy black hairstyle swept back from the face. The facial features are delicately painted, with pronounced eyes, red lips, and a subtle blush on the cheeks. The back of the dress is laced up, and the overall appearance is reminiscent of a cabaret or burlesque performer. The doll's limbs are elongated and stylized, with a rigid, upright posture and arms extended horizontally.
description: A stylized female doll in a red-to-black corset dress, long black gloves, thigh-high stockings, and high heels, with short black hair and delicate facial features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's detailed facial features, corset dress with gold trim, and the full length of the gloves and stockings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the doll's profile, the curve of the dress, and the high-heeled shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the laced-up back of the dress, the back of the gloves and stockings, and the hairstyle's volume.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg contours, as well as the shoe's heel.
attribute_clothing_style: Strapless corset dress with a red-to-black gradient and gold trim, long black opera gloves, thigh-high glossy black stockings, and black high-heeled shoes, evoking a cabaret or burlesque fashion theme.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso erect.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with slightly parted red lips, wide open eyes, and delicately arched eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Short, wavy black hair swept back from the face, with a voluminous crown.
